frame_label: Dress Code: Traditional = Respectable, Other = Questionable
generated_comment: Yaar, honestly, girls look much more decent in Indian wear only. Saree ya simple salwar mein there is a different grace; these very western type clothes just send the wrong message sometimes, then people will obviously stare.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it links a woman's clothing with her decency and suggests western clothes 'send the wrong message.' It encodes the traditional-wear-is-respectable trope and subtly shifts blame for harassment onto women's dress.
persona_text: You are Sameer. Age 29. Single. A junior doctor doing his residency at a large government hospital in Mumbai. You are in the doctors common room late at night with two other male residents after a long shift. Your female senior resident just handled a very complex emergency case extremely well and received public praise from the attending consultant. You are talking about what happened with your colleagues.
